subject: fix(graph): darken COMPONENT_COLORS palette for white text readability
body:
Same fix as LABEL_COLORS — component analysis overlay sets background
colors on nodes, so these also need luminance ≤ 0.35 for white text.

Tags: graph, cytoscape, palette, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
